  • Classes in com.google.cloud.pubsublite.internal used by com.google.cloud.pubsublite.cloudpubsub.internal 
    Class and Description
    CheckedApiException
    A wrapper around an ApiException that is a checked exception to help ensure correctness of internal classes as well as ease construction of ApiExceptions.
    ProxyService 
    Publisher
    A generic PubSub Lite publisher.
    TrivialProxyService
    A ProxyService that just wraps all ApiService methods.

    A wrapper around an ApiException that is a checked exception to help ensure correctness of internal classes as well as ease construction of ApiExceptions.
